problem_statement: SDLC processes still depend on manual oversight, causing delays, misaligned requirements, and rework; the paper addresses how to embed governance and human approval into an agentic AI system that automates the software development lifecycle while managing risks like hallucination and miscalibration.
insufficiency_evidence: "most of these automation efforts are narrow in scope... rather than coordinating the entire workflow. The burden of decision-making, planning, and cross-tool synchronization still rests on human project managers and engineering leads."
solution_mechanisms: human approval at critical decision points
hybrid parametric+ML estimation with uncertainty intervals
notes: Proposed/aspirational system; evaluation results are from a proposed framework with synthetic case studies and self-reported gains, not independently validated.
